testcase.name: test_general_ledger_filter_by_party_type_customer
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_ledger_integrity.py:35: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
